name: Homemade Cracker Jacks
recipeInstructions:
1. Mix popcorn and peanuts together in a large bowl or pan.
2. Cook molasses and sugar together until the mixture reaches a temperature of 235°F (a candy thermometer is handy for this).
- If you don't have a thermometer, test the syrup by letting some drop from a spoon into a cup of cold water. The syrup is done when it forms a thread as it drops into the water.
3. Pour hot syrup mixture over the popcorn and nut mixture and stir to coat evenly.
4. Cool and break into chunks with a wooden spoon.
5. Store in an airtight container; the mixture will keep well for 4 to 6 weeks.
